meta.description: Preset vertex geometries for MST visualizer and future benchmarks
meta.coordinates: Normalized [0.0, 1.0] — scaled to canvas at runtime

presets.name: Demo Hex (6)
presets.description: Default hexagonal-ish layout for initial demo (6 points)

presets.name: Equilateral Triangle (3)
presets.description: Classic Steiner tree case — optimal junction is Fermat point at 120°

presets.name: Square (4)
presets.description: Four corners — tests diagonal advantage of Steiner tree

presets.name: Plus / Cross (5)
presets.description: Center point with 4 cardinal satellites

presets.name: Collinear (6)
presets.description: All points on a line — degenerate case, MST = simple path

presets.name: Regular Pentagon (5)
presets.description: 5 vertices equally spaced on a circle

presets.name: Two Clusters (6)
presets.description: Two tight groups far apart — tests bridge-building

presets.name: Grid 3x3 (9)
presets.description: 9 points in a regular grid — many equidistant edges

presets.name: Circle (8)
presets.description: 8 points evenly distributed on a circle

presets.name: L-Shape (5)
presets.description: 5 points forming an L — tests non-convex routing

presets.name: Wide Spread (5)
presets.description: 5 points maximally spread — long MST, potential for Steiner savings

presets.name: Star / Asterisk (5)
presets.description: 4 satellite points around a center — all equidistant

presets.name: Zigzag (6)
presets.description: Alternating left-right pattern — tests non-local connections

presets.name: T-Shape (6)
presets.description: 6 points forming a T — tests junction optimization

presets.name: Sparse Triangle (3)
presets.description: 3 vertices at maximum distance — Steiner savings very visible

presets.name: Random Small (10) — seed 7
presets.description: 10 random points, reproducible — baseline for medium-size testing

presets.name: Grid 5x4 (20)
presets.description: 20 points in a 5×4 rectangular grid — tests many equal-weight edges

presets.name: Circular Shell (30)
presets.description: 30 points on a circle perimeter — tests Steiner tree in annular geometry

presets.name: Random Medium (50) — seed 42
presets.description: 50 random points — good for benchmarking with visible time differences

presets.name: Random Large (200) — seed 42
presets.description: 200 random points — stress test for O(n²) edge sorting
